query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.description,
  p.createdBy,
  u.name as creatorName,
  u.email as creatorEmail,
  p.createdAt
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.createdBy = u.id
ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC;
